purpose: discover current AGENTS.md and README.md coverage across Octopus_OS root, container roots, and Mother_Doc docs
machine_follow_up: use mother-doc-agents-registry --json only after collect has refreshed registry.json
use mother-doc-agents-target-contract for path-specific runtime guidance
stage_runtime_rules: scan only detects current managed coverage and missing files; it does not rewrite ordinary docs
scan is allowed to report missing AGENTS.md, missing README.md, and legacy agents.md paths
scan output is an operational report, not the long-lived runtime contract
